menu.title: Menu
menu.asReadyDesc: Each dish arrives as soon as it's ready.
menu.togetherDesc: Starters and drinks come out as they're ready; mains all come out together.
menu.prepayHint: Your order goes to the kitchen as soon as we confirm payment.
menu.addMoreHint: You can add more dishes during the meal.
menu.liveStatusHint: From there you can track it live and pay.
menu.nameSubtitle: This lets your friends see what you ordered and what they ordered.
menu.namePrivacy: Only shown to people at your table. We don't create an account.
menu.etaClosedShort: We're closed for now. Come back during the next service.
menu.etaSaturatedInfo: Kitchen at capacity{cap}. We can't take more orders right now.
menu.etaNormal: Based on the orders currently in the kitchen.
menu.pickupNamePlaceholder: So we can call you when it's ready
menu.demoHint: Demo mode. Enable payments to use Apple Pay.
menu.paymentApprovalHint: Your order enters the kitchen only once payment is approved.
menu.errNeedName: We need your name to call you.
menu.errNeedPhone: Enter your mobile number so we can let you know when it's ready.
menu.errApplePayInactive: Apple Pay isn't enabled for this restaurant yet.
menu.errSaturated: Kitchen at capacity (ETA {eta} min, cap {max} min). Try again in a few minutes.
menu.errClosed: We're closed for now. Come back during the next service.
menu.errDeclined: The payment was declined by the bank.
menu.sendError: We couldn't send the order. Check your connection.

landing.devTableHint: In real life this step doesn't exist: your table has a QR that takes you straight to the menu.

order.cancelledTitle: {count, plural, one {One dish in your order was cancelled} other {# dishes in your order were cancelled}}
order.cancelledBody: The server will come by your table to let you know. You won't be charged for what was cancelled.
order.receiptHint: Email yourself the receipt or request an electronic invoice.
order.toastReadyHint: It's on its way to your table.
order.etaHeadlineFew: Your order is coming out in a few minutes
order.etaHeadlineMin: Your order is coming out in ~{min} min
order.etaSubDefault: It may change if the kitchen speeds up or gets busy.
order.calledLessMin: Called less than a minute ago
order.errCancelTaken: The kitchen already took it. It can't be cancelled.

pay.declinedBody: Try another method below, or ask the server to run the card again.
pay.howToPay: How would you like to pay?
pay.noGuestsHint: Nobody left their name on the dishes — use Split evenly.
pay.demoHintOp: Demo mode. In production you'll charge with a real card reader (enable payments for the restaurant).
pay.demoHintDiner: Demo mode. In production you'll only see Apple Pay (Safari), card reader and cash (enable payments for the restaurant).
pay.errDeclined: Payment declined. Try another card or method.
pay.errPushTerminal: We couldn't send the charge to the card reader.
pay.cashQuestion: How much will you pay with?
pay.cashSubtitle: Optional. This way the server arrives with the right change.
pay.cashFootnote: If you end up paying with a different bill, tell the server when they arrive.
pay.pseIntro: Choose your bank and we'll take you straight to its gateway to authorize the transfer.
pay.pseFootnote: Secure payment via PSE. We'll open your bank's page to authorize.
pay.errBankList: We couldn't load the bank list.
pay.errTokenizePse: We couldn't process the payment. Try again.
pay.errNoTokenPse: We couldn't process the payment. Try another bank or method.
pay.cardNamePlaceholder: As it appears on the card
pay.errCardName: Enter the name as it appears on the card.
pay.errCardEmail: Invalid email. We need it for the receipt.
pay.errNoTokenCard: We couldn't process the payment. Try again.
pay.errTokenizeCard: We couldn't process the card. Try again.
pay.opCashSubtitle: Note how much the customer handed you. If they tell you to keep the change (all or part), choose what to do with it below.
pay.changeQuestion: What do they do with the {amount} change?
pay.mustPayAtLeast: The customer must hand you at least {amount}.
pay.changeTooHigh: Change can't be more than the amount received.
pay.changeExceeds: The change is {amount} more than it should be. The customer owes you that difference.

done.showCashier: Show it to the cashier when they call you.
done.preparingHint: We'll let you know here when it's ready.
done.keepPayingHint: Someone else at the table can keep paying. This screen updates on its own.
done.invGeneratedBody: It was sent to {email}. If you can't find it, check your spam folder or let the restaurant know.
done.invPendingBody: The restaurant issues it manually from their invoicing software and sends it to {email}.
done.invReceiptIntro: A simple receipt only asks for your email. If you need an invoice under a company name or ID, request it separately.
done.invToName: Electronic invoice under my name or company
done.invSentBody: We sent it to {email}. If it doesn't arrive in a few minutes check your spam folder.
done.invSimpleIntro: We only need your email. We'll send you the receipt with all the restaurant's details and the dishes you ordered.
done.invDoneBody: The restaurant will receive your request and issue the invoice from their system. It'll reach {email} within the next few hours.
done.invSavedHint: Only on this device. If you clear your browser data they're lost.
done.invAddressHint: Search and select your address — city and state fill in automatically.
done.invPrivacy: Your details are only shared with the restaurant to issue your invoice.
done.invErrAlreadyGenerated: An invoice was already generated for this order. Contact the restaurant for corrections.
done.invErrNotPaid: The order isn't marked as paid yet.
done.invErrInvalid: Check the details: something is incomplete.

wait.cashApprovedBody: Thanks for visiting. We hope to see you soon.
wait.cashCancelledBody: Your cash payment request was cancelled. You can try again.
wait.cashWaitTitle: The server is coming to charge you
wait.cashWaitBody: We've notified your server. Have {amount} ready and wait a moment at your table.
wait.cashWaitHint: When the server confirms the payment, this screen updates on its own.
wait.terminalApprovedBody: Thanks for your purchase. Moving on to the final confirmation.
wait.terminalDeclinedBody: We're taking you back to checkout to pick another method…
wait.terminalWaitTitle: The server is coming with the card reader
wait.terminalWaitBody: We'll charge you {amount} on the terminal. Just tap your card when it arrives.
wait.terminalWaitHint: This screen updates on its own when the card reader confirms.
wait.tdsConfirming: We're confirming with your bank. Don't close this window.
wait.tdsErrNoAmount: We couldn't recover the payment amount. Try again from checkout.
wait.tdsErrCharge: We couldn't complete the charge. Try again.
wait.applePayError: We couldn't complete the Apple Pay payment.
wait.pseDeclinedBankBody: Your bank declined the transfer. You can try another method or retry PSE.
wait.pseDeclinedBody: The payment didn't go through. Try another method.
wait.pseProcessingBody: We're confirming the result of your transfer with your bank. It may take a few seconds.

pickup.unavailableBody: This restaurant hasn't enabled pickup ordering yet.
pickup.noNextOpening: No upcoming opening scheduled. Come back later.
pickup.showCode: Show the code to the cashier.
pickup.notifyHint: We'll let you know on this screen when it's ready.

reservar.closedBody: {name} is not taking online reservations right now.
reservar.detailsSent: We sent the details to {email}. Keep this code in case you need to cancel.
reservar.depositExplain: This table requires a {amount} deposit to confirm. It's credited to your bill when you arrive.
reservar.depositTimerNote: You have a few minutes to complete payment before the table is released. If you don't show up, the deposit isn't refunded.
reservar.title: Reserve your table
reservar.noSlots: No times available for this date. Try another day.
reservar.pickTableMap: Pick your table on the map
reservar.depositInfo: Requires a {amount} deposit to hold — credited to your bill on arrival (non-refundable if you don't show up).
reservar.notesPlaceholder: Anything we should know (optional): birthday, allergies, table by the window…
reservar.howPayDeposit: How would you like to pay the deposit?
reservar.cardNamePlaceholder: As it appears on the card
reservar.cardSecureNote: Secure payment. Your card details aren't stored on MESAPAY.
reservar.errCardName: Enter the name as it appears on the card.
reservar.errProcessCard: We couldn't process the payment. Try again.
reservar.appleUnavailable: Apple Pay isn't available for this restaurant.
reservar.errDepositApple: We couldn't charge the deposit with Apple Pay.
reservar.pseSecureNote: We'll take you to your bank to authorize the transfer securely.
reservar.errPseRetry: We couldn't start PSE. Try again.
reservar.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel your reservation?
reservar.errCancel: We couldn’t cancel. Try again or call the restaurant.
reservar.notActive: This reservation is no longer active.
reservar.contactRestaurant: For changes, contact the restaurant directly.
reservar.depositReceivedWithAmount: We received your {amount} deposit. It’s credited to your bill when you arrive.
reservar.depositReceivedNoAmount: We received your deposit. It’s credited to your bill when you arrive.
reservar.depositDeclinedBody: Your bank didn’t confirm the transfer. You can try the reservation again.
reservar.processingBody: We’re confirming your transfer with the bank. This can take a few seconds.

emailReservation.statusRequested: We got your request. The restaurant will confirm it soon and we’ll let you know.
emailReservation.depositNote: Your {amount} deposit is credited to your bill when you arrive.
emailReservation.footerNote: If you can’t make it, cancel ahead of time to free up the table.

emailWelcome.subject: Welcome to MESAPAY
emailWelcome.title: Welcome to MESAPAY
emailWelcome.intro: Thanks for creating your account. You can now order and pay from the table at any MESAPAY restaurant — no apps, no lines.
emailWelcome.benefit2: Pay faster without re-entering your details.
emailWelcome.ctaText: Whenever you want to check your orders, go to {url}

emailInvoice.subject: Your receipt from {brand} — {number}
emailInvoice.emailIntro: We got your payment — here’s your receipt. If you need to print it in receipt format, open the button at the end of the email.
emailInvoice.printLead: Need to print it? Open the receipt in your browser to send it to your thermal or paper printer.
emailInvoice.printText: To print your receipt in POS format, open it in your browser:
emailInvoice.footerHelp: If you have questions about your bill, contact {brand} directly.
emailInvoice.sentBy: Sent by MESAPAY · Made in Colombia

operator.suspendedBody: Access to {name} is paused. Contact MESAPAY to reactivate it.
operator.membershipOverdue: Subscription overdue. Settle the payment to avoid losing access.

kitchen.cancelPresetTitleUnavailable: {label} (also removes the dish from the menu)
kitchen.cancelPlaceholder: E.g. customer changed their mind, ingredient ran out…
kitchen.cancelMarkUnavailable: Also remove this dish from the menu until it's available again

serve.allDeliveredBody: When the kitchen marks something ready, it'll show up here.
serve.title: Floor
serve.summaryTerminals: {count, plural, one {# card terminal} other {# card terminals}}
serve.summaryCash: {count, plural, one {# cash charge} other {# cash charges}}
serve.summaryReady: {count, plural, one {# dish ready} other {# dishes ready}}
serve.cancelledTellCustomer: Go to the table and let the customer know.
serve.terminalSwipeExternal: Swipe the card on your terminal and report the result.
serve.terminalBringDevice: Bring the card terminal to the table and press "Charge".
serve.terminalNoDevice: No active card terminal registered. Ask the admin to register one at /admin.
serve.terminalSendError: We couldn't send to the card terminal.
serve.cashTipExplainer: The tip is saved in the payment for the shift close and reports. It has nothing to do with Kushki.
serve.waitingKitchen: Waiting on kitchen · {count, plural, one {# main in progress} other {# mains in progress}}

opOrders.title: Orders
opOrders.summary: {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} · {paidCount, plural, one {# paid} other {# paid}} · {amount}

opReservas.title: Reservations
opReservas.disabledBody: The reservations module is disabled. Enable it in <link>Settings → Reservations</link>.
opReservas.subtitle: Upcoming reservations and today's. Confirm, mark arrival or no-show.
opReservas.depositApplied: Deposit credited to the table's bill.

opTables.autoRefreshNote: The detail refreshes automatically every 15 seconds.
opTables.confirmCancelOrder: Cancel the entire bill? This only works if the kitchen hasn't started yet. If something has already been cooked, cancel/comp dish by dish with a reason.
opTables.cancelOrderKitchenStarted: The kitchen already started a dish. Cancel dish by dish.
opTables.compItemFailed: We couldn't comp the dish. Try again.
opTables.cancelItemFailed: We couldn't cancel the dish. Try again.
opTables.moveHint: Only available tables are listed. If the destination table has an open bill, close it before moving.
opTables.compSheetSubtitle: The dish comes off the subtotal but stays recorded as delivered. It appears in the comped-items report with the reason.
opTables.cancelSheetSubtitle: It leaves the order, the kitchen board, and the subtotal. This action can't be undone — if it was a mistake, it'll have to be reordered.
opTables.newTableInvalidNumber: The number must be a positive integer.
opTables.confirmCancelOrderSimple: Cancel this order? It can't be reverted.
opTables.printIntro: 30×30mm cards on an A4 sheet — up to 45 per sheet. Flush cards with a shared border: a single cut per line.
opTables.shareLinksHint: Same link encoded in each table's QR. Handy if you want to send it by chat or paste it elsewhere.
